title: Snap Inc. Announces Second Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text:
Snap Inc. Announces Second Quarter 2024 Financial Results

Revenue Performance

Revenue for the second quarter 2024 was $1,237 million, compared to $1,068 million in the prior year, an increase of 16% year-over-year.

Profitability and Cash Flow

Net loss was $249 million in Q2 2024, compared to $377 million in the prior year, representing a 34% improvement. Adjusted EBITDA was $55 million, compared to $(38) million in the prior year. Operating cash flow was $181 million, compared to $141 million in the prior year.

User Metrics

Daily active users were 432 million in Q2 2024, an increase of 9% year-over-year. Monthly active users reached more than 850 million, and Snapchat+ subscriptions exceeded 11 million paying subscribers.

Geographic Breakdown

North America revenue was $767.5 million, representing 62.1% of total revenue and an increase of 11.8% year-over-year. Europe revenue was $229.8 million, representing 18.6% of total revenue and an increase of 26.2% year-over-year. Rest of World revenue was $239.4 million, an increase of 20.5% year-over-year.
